name: Anchor Down Rv Resort
description: Anchor Down Rv Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dandridge, TN. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. You can reserve the courts.

name: Dandridge Field of Dreams
description: Come play pickleball at Dandridge Field of Dreams in Dandridge, TN! There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Jefferson City Community Center
description: Jefferson City Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Jefferson City, TN. There are 4 acrylic courts. 2 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, locker rooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility.
